<title>Motel One Wien-Westbahnhof，维也纳（2026最新房价）</title>
<meta name="description" content="Motel One汽车旅馆是一家现代化酒店，位于维也纳的西火车站（Westbahnhof）交通枢纽和购物中心内，距离市中心有10分钟的地铁车程，设有免费无线网络连接，提供空调隔音客房。
时尚的客房设有平面卫星电视、可移动工作区以及带典雅家具和花洒淋浴的设计新颖的浴室。
Motel One Wien-Westbahnhof汽车旅馆设有24小时前台以及装饰有雅各布森（Arne Jacobsen）设计的座椅和施华洛世奇（Swarovski）水晶吊灯的酒吧。
Mariahilfer Straße购物大街距离旅馆仅有几步之遥，地铁U3和U6号线在旅馆内也有停靠站，机场巴士站就位于旅馆外面。">
<link rel="canonical" href="https://www.booking.com/hotel/at/motel-one-wien-westbahnhof.zh-cn.html">
<meta name="booking-verification" content="eyJyZiI6IiIsInRpIjoxNzgyMjEwMTk4LCJsYiI6IiIsImlwIjoiODUuMTkwLjIzOS4xNTQiLCJpYyI6ImNuIiwidWEiOiIiLCJ1dCI6ImJvdCJ9">

document.head.appendChild(script);
};
function addToWindowLoad(f) {
if (window.addEventListener) {
window.addEventListener('load', f);
} else if (window.attachEvent) { // support older IE versions
window.attachEvent('onload', f);
} else {
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', f); // final fallback
}
}
addToWindowLoad(function(e) {
setTimeout(appendScriptFunction, 1000);
});
})();
</script>

<div class="bui-grid__column bui-grid__column-3">
<style>
/*
I know it's ugly and shouldn't be done like this.
The reason for inlining this styles, is that I want to include them only for the experiment,
as well as for booking owned websites.
Also, these components that are used here should be migrated to Capla within this year timespan.
So this is temporary change, and I know that there is nothing more permanent than temporary.
*/
.hp-sidebar--right {
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
height: 100%;
}
.hp-sidebar__reviews {
margin-bottom: var(--bui_spacing_4x);
overflow: hidden;
}
.hp-sidebar__reviews .hp-gallery-review {
position: initial;
}
.hp-sidebar__reviews #reviewFloater {
float: none;
padding: 0;
width: 100%;
}
.hp-sidebar__reviews #reviewFloater .featured_review_score,
.hp-sidebar__reviews .external_reviews_popover {
float: none;
margin-bottom: 0;
padding: var(--bui_spacing_3x);
width: 100%;
}
.hp-sidebar__reviews .external_reviews_popover {
width: auto;
}
.hp-sidebar__reviews .featured_review_score .big_review_score_detailed {
clear: initial;
float: none;
}
.hp-sidebar__reviews .reviews-carousel {
width: 100%;
}
.hp-sidebar__reviews .best-review-score {
margin: 0;
padding: var(--bui_spacing_3x);
}
.hp-sidebar__reviews .best-review-score.inferred-location-score {
margin: 0;
padding: 0;
}
.hp-sidebar__map {
flex: 1;
height: auto;
overflow: hidden;
}
</style>
<div class="hp-sidebar--right">
<div class="hp-sidebar__reviews bui-box bui-box--border-color-neutral_alt bui-box--border-radius-100 bui-box--border-width-100 bui-box--padding-none">
<div class="hp-gallery-review">

<span class=" review_list_score_breakdown_right">

</li>

<div data-capla-component-boundary="b-property-web-property-page/PropertyQAActiveBooking" data-capla-hydration="0"></div>
<div class="page-section hp--desc_highlights js-k2-hp--block">
<div class="bui-grid">
<div class="bui-grid__column bui-grid__column-8 k2-hp--description">
<div class="hp-description" data-et-view="goal:hp_property_description_seen">
<div class="hp_desc_main_content">
<div data-capla-component-boundary="b-property-web-property-page/PropertyDescriptionDesktop" data-capla-hydration="0"><div class="c3bdfd4ac2" style="--bui_box_spaced_padding--s: 0;"><div></div><div></div><div></div><p data-testid="property-description" class="b99b6ef58f f1152bae71">Motel One汽车旅馆是一家现代化酒店，位于维也纳的西火车站（Westbahnhof）交通枢纽和购物中心内，距离市中心有10分钟的地铁车程，设有免费无线网络连接，提供空调隔音客房。

时尚的客房设有平面卫星电视、可移动工作区以及带典雅家具和花洒淋浴的设计新颖的浴室。

Motel One Wien-Westbahnhof汽车旅馆设有24小时前台以及装饰有雅各布森（Arne Jacobsen）设计的座椅和施华洛世奇（Swarovski）水晶吊灯的酒吧。

Mariahilfer Straße购物大街距离旅馆仅有几步之遥，地铁U3和U6号线在旅馆内也有停靠站，机场巴士站就位于旅馆外面。</p><p data-testid="property-description-location-score-trans" class="">夫妻/情侣特别喜欢这家住宿的位置，为两人住宿体验给出了<b>9.5分</b>。</p><p data-testid="PropertyDescriptionOsmDisclaimer" class="fff1944c52 fb14de7f14">住宿简介中的距离计算使用的是© OpenStreetMap</p></div></div>
</div>
<div data-et-view="bNXGDJdLTLScXQOVWe:1"></div>
</div>
<div class="hp--popular_facilities js-k2-hp--block">
<div data-et-view="eWHMYTBADDbddPKFTdRNYYdXGBbLPNOcMXT:2 eWHMYTBADDbddPKFTdRNYYdXGBbLPNOcMXT:4 "></div>

<script nonce="">
;(function() {
'use strict';
if(document && document.addEventListener && document.querySelectorAll) {
var BUTTON_SELECTOR = '.book_now_button_handler';
var reserveButtons = document.querySelectorAll(BUTTON_SELECTOR);
reserveButtons = Array.prototype.slice.call(reserveButtons);
if(reserveButtons && reserveButtons.length) {
reserveButtons.forEach(function(button) {
button.addEventListener('click', goToAvailabilityBlock);
});
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
reserveButtons.forEach(function(button) {
button.removeEventListener('click', goToAvailabilityBlock);
});
});
}
}
function goToAvailabilityBlock() {
if(window.history && window.history.replaceState) {
var uri = window.location.toString();
if (uri.indexOf("#") > 0) {
var uriWithoutHash = uri.substring(0, uri.indexOf("#"));
window.history.replaceState({}, document.title, uriWithoutHash);
}
}
var RT_SELECTOR = '.hp-section-header';
var roomsTable = document.querySelector(RT_SELECTOR);
if(roomsTable) {
window.scrollTo(0, roomsTable.offsetTop);
}
}
})();
</script>

<div data-capla-component-boundary="b-property-web-property-page/PropertyPageFAQ" data-capla-hydration="0"><div class="page-section js-k2-hp--faq" id="pp-faq"><div itemscope="" itemtype="https://schema.org/FAQPage" itemid="https://www.booking.com/hotel/at/motel-one-wien-westbahnhof.zh-cn.html" class="f6e3a11b0d ae5dbab14d e95943ce9b" style="--bui_stack_spaced_gap--s: 4;"><div class="ecb8d66605 daadf70613"><h2 class="a4ac75716e f546354b44 cc045b173b">Motel One Wien-Westbahnhof常见问题及解答</h2></div><div data-testid="faqs-list" class="f6e3a11b0d a19a26a18c d38ad692ea e95943ce9b aec8a642f4 f7aa4721a5" style="--bui_stack_spaced_gap--s: 4; --bui_stack_spaced_gap--m: 6;"><div class="afd3558156 fd0a79d7e8"><div data-testid="faq-accordion-left-card" class="c3bdfd4ac2 a0ab5da06c d46ff48a92 f728e61e72 d0acd69e66 c256f1a28a" style="--bui_box_spaced_padding--s: 0;"><div itemscope="" itemprop="mainEntity" itemtype="https://schema.org/Question" class="e5e285812b"><div class="fdfda722eb" style="--bui_accordion_spaced_--vertical-spacing--s: 0;"><button class="cec0620c60" type="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls=":r42:" id=":r41:"><span class="d10f6911f7"><h3 itemprop="name" data-testid="question" class="e7addce19e">Motel One Wien-Westbahnhof供应哪些类型的早餐？</h3></span><span class="fc70cba028 e19912385b c2a70a5db2 bc7d708ceb" aria-hidden="true"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="50px"><path d="M19.268 8.913a.9.9 0 0 1-.266.642l-6.057 6.057A1.3 1.3 0 0 1 12 16c-.35.008-.69-.123-.945-.364L4.998 9.58a.91.91 0 0 1 0-1.284.897.897 0 0 1 1.284 0L12 13.99l5.718-5.718a.897.897 0 0 1 1.284 0 .88.88 0 0 1 .266.642"></path></svg></span></button><div class="fd8f72d6ed" style="overflow: hidden;"><div aria-labelledby=":r41:" role="region" class="f92d48f0f7" hidden="" id=":r42:"><div id="content-1" itemscope="" itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer" itemprop="acceptedAnswer"><div itemprop="text" data-testid="answer" class="b99b6ef58f b4207c2ab6"><p>入住Motel One Wien-Westbahnhof客人可享用优质早餐（早餐评分：8）。

早餐种类：</p><ul class="dd2232e8aa"><li>欧陆式</li><li>素食</li><li>全素食</li><li>无麸质</li><li>自助餐</li></ul></div></div></div></div></div></div><hr class="f5a887a489 cca4521350" aria-hidden="true"><div itemscope="" itemprop="mainEntity" itemtype="https://schema.org/Question" class="e5e285812b"><div class="fdfda722eb" style="--bui_accordion_spaced_--vertical-spacing--s: 0;"><button class="cec0620c60" type="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls=":r44:" id=":r43:"><span class="d10f6911f7"><h3 itemprop="name" data-testid="question" class="e7addce19e">我可以在Motel One Wien-Westbahnhof预订什么类型的客房？</h3></span><span class="fc70cba028 e19912385b c2a70a5db2 bc7d708ceb" aria-hidden="true"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="50px"><path .88.88 0 0 1 .266.642"></path></svg></span></button><div class="fd8f72d6ed" style="overflow: hidden;"><div aria-labelledby=":r43:" role="region" class="f92d48f0f7" hidden="" id=":r44:"><div id="content-2" itemscope="" itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer" itemprop="acceptedAnswer"><div itemprop="text" data-testid="answer" class="b99b6ef58f b4207c2ab6"><p>Motel One Wien-Westbahnhof提供以下房型：</p><ul class="dd2232e8aa"><li>双人间</li></ul></div></div></div></div></div></div><hr class="f5a887a489 cca4521350" aria-hidden="true"><div itemscope="" itemprop="mainEntity" itemtype="https://schema.org/Question" class="e5e285812b"><div class="fdfda722eb" style="--bui_accordion_spaced_--vertical-spacing--s: 0;"><button class="cec0620c60" type="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls=":r46:" id=":r45:"><span class="d10f6911f7"><h3 itemprop="name" data-testid="question" class="e7addce19e">Motel One Wien-Westbahnhof入住和退房时间是什么时候？</h3></span><span .266.642"></path></svg></span></button><div class="fd8f72d6ed" style="overflow: hidden;"><div aria-labelledby=":r45:" role="region" class="f92d48f0f7" hidden="" id=":r46:"><div id="content-3" itemscope="" itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer" itemprop="acceptedAnswer"><div itemprop="text" data-testid="answer" class="b99b6ef58f b4207c2ab6"><p>Motel One Wien-Westbahnhof入住时间为15:00起，退房时间为12:00前。</p></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="afd3558156 fd0a79d7e8"><div data-testid="faq-accordion-right-card" class="c3bdfd4ac2 a0ab5da06c data-testid="answer" class="b99b6ef58f b4207c2ab6"><p>根据不同情况（如：所选日期、酒店政策等），Motel One Wien-Westbahnhof的价格可能有所不同。请输入日期，查看具体价格。</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><hr class="f5a887a489 cca4521350" <a href="#" id="pipl-personalization-footer-btn" data-modal-id="personalisation-modal" data-component="privacy/personalisation-modal" data-modal-keep-mounted="true" data-modal-close-aria-label="关闭" style="display:none;">
</a>
<template id="personalisation-modal" data-component="privacy/personalisation-modal" style="display: none !important;">
<header class="bui-modal__header">
<h2 class="bui-modal__title" id="modal-default-title" data-bui-ref="modal-title">
&nbsp;
</h2>
<p class="bui-modal__paragraph" id="modal-default-subtitle" data-bui-ref="modal-subtitle">
开启此项功能后，您将可以看到与您相关的搜索结果，以提升您的浏览体验。如关闭此功能，您看到的将是基于点评分数以及低价的搜索结果。
</p>
</header>
<footer class="bui-modal__footer">
<div class="bui-switch">
<div class="bui-input-text__content">
<input type="checkbox" checked="checked" id="personalization-switch-1" class="bui-switch__trigger" aria-label="
个性化推荐
" aria-checked="true" role="switch">
<label for="personalization-switch-1" aria-hidden="true" class="bui-switch__hitbox" data-on-value="
开启
" data-off-value="
关闭
">
<span class="bui-switch__indicator"></span>
</label>
</div>
</div>
</footer>
</template>
<style>
.rtl .bui-switch__trigger:checked + .bui-switch__hitbox .bui-switch__indicator:before,
[dir="rtl"] .bui-switch__trigger:checked + .bui-switch__hitbox .bui-switch__indicator:before {
transform: translate(calc(-1 * var(--bui_spacing_6x)));
}
</style>
<script type="text/javascript" nonce="">
(function () {
document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
if (e.target.id === 'personalization-switch-1') {
toggleSwitchLock(true);
var httpRequest = new XMLHttpRequest();
httpRequest.open('PUT', '/consent/personalization?value=' + (e.target.checked ? '0' : '1'), true);
httpRequest.onload = function () {
toggleSwitchLock(false);
B.require('events').trigger('privacy:personalisation-updated');
}
httpRequest.send();
}
});
function toggleSwitchLock(lock) {
var checkbox = document.getElementById('personalization-switch-1');
if (lock) {
checkbox.setAttribute('disabled', 'disabled');
} else {
checkbox.removeAttribute('disabled');
}
}
function trackCustomGoal(goal) {
if (window.B && window.B.et) {
window.B.et.customGoal('YTBeWfCDIXLSGbDaFSRfABNIPRaO', goal);
}
}
})();
</script>
</div>

<div id="revc_write_a_review_login_intro" style="display:none;" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true">
<span class="invisible_spoken">开始对话框内容</span>
<div class="intro_header">
<h2 class="bui-modal__title">真实住客真实点评。</h2>
<p class="bui-modal__paragraph">我们的住宿点评超过7000万条，所有点评均来自<strong>真实有效的客人</strong>。</p>
</div>
<div class="rlp-intro">
<div class="rlp-intro__container clearfix">
<h2 class="rlp-intro__title rlp-intro__a11y-exp-title">这些评语是如何产生的？</h2>
<ul class="rlp-intro-how a11y_contrast_blue_gray">
<li class="rlp-intro-how__item fl">
<div class="rlp-intro-how__container rlp-intro-how__container--tickfull">
<div class="rlp-intro-how__sub-container">
<p class="rlp-intro-how__num rlp-intro-how__num--tickfull">1</p>
<p class="rlp-intro-how__icon bicon-tickfull" aria-hidden="true"></p>
</div>
</div>
<h3 class="rlp-intro-how__title rlp-intro-how__a11y-exp-title">从预订开始</h3>
<span class="rlp-intro-how__title rlp-intro-how__caption">从预订开始</span>
<p class="rlp-intro-how__desc">仅有做了预订的客人可填写评语。只有这样，我们才能确保评语来自于曾入住过酒店的真实住客。</p>
</li>
<li class="rlp-intro-how__arrow fl" aria-hidden="true">
<p class="rlp-intro-how__arrow-icon bicon-rightchevron"></p>
</li>
<li class="rlp-intro-how__item fl">
<div class="rlp-intro-how__container rlp-intro-how__container--citytrip">
<div class="rlp-intro-how__sub-container">
<p class="rlp-intro-how__num rlp-intro-how__num--citytrip">2</p>
<p class="rlp-intro-how__icon bicon-citytrip" aria-hidden="true"></p>
</div>
</div>
<h3 class="rlp-intro-how__title rlp-intro-how__a11y-exp-title">然后启程</h3>
<span class="rlp-intro-how__title rlp-intro-how__caption">然后启程</span>
<p class="rlp-intro-how__desc">客人入住酒店时亲身体验了客房是否安静、员工是否友善，等等。</p>
</li>
<li class="rlp-intro-how__arrow fl" aria-hidden="true">
<p class="rlp-intro-how__arrow-icon bicon-rightchevron"></p>
</li>
<li class="rlp-intro-how__item fl">
<div class="rlp-intro-how__container rlp-intro-how__container--feedback">
<div class="rlp-intro-how__sub-container">
<p class="rlp-intro-how__num rlp-intro-how__num--feedback">3</p>
<p class="rlp-intro-how__icon bicon-feedback" aria-hidden="true"></p>
</div>
</div>
<h3 class="rlp-intro-how__title rlp-intro-how__a11y-exp-title">最后，填写评语</h3>
<span class="rlp-intro-how__title rlp-intro-how__caption">最后，填写评语</span>
<p class="rlp-intro-how__desc">旅程结束后，客人们将他们的住宿体验告诉我们。我们会验证所有评语的真实性并检查是否包含不雅语言，然后再添加到我们的网站上。</p>
</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
<p>如果您在我们网站预订过住宿并希望提交评语，请先登录</p>
<div class="intro_footer">
<a href="https://secure.booking.com/reviewtimeline.zh-cn.html" class="revc_write_a_review_login_button">登录并提交评语</a>
</div>
<span class="invisible_spoken">结束对话框内容</span>
</div>

<div class="calendar_popup_title"><p id="calendar_check_in_title">入住日期</p>
<p id="calendar_check_out_title">退房日期</p>
</div>

var body = $( document.body );

document.getElementById('blockdisplay' + j).style.display = (j === i) ? 'block' : 'none';

bMovableBookNowButton.init();

}

2":"星期二","3":"星期三","4":"星期四","5":"星期五","6":"星期六","7":"星期日","8":"name_from","other":""}},"weekday_formatted_date/name_on":{"type":"list","items":{"1":"星期一","2":"星期二","3":"星期三","4":"星期四","5":"星期五","6":"星期六","7":"星期日","8":"name_on","other":""}},"weekday_formatted_date/name_to":{"type":"list","items":{"1":"星期一","2":"星期二","3":"星期三","4":"星期四","5":"星期五","6":"星期六","7":"星期日","8":"name_to","other":""}},"weekday_formatted_date/short":{"type":"list","items":{"1":"周一","2":"周二","3":"周三","4":"周四","5":"周五","6":"周六","7":"周日","8":"short","other":""}},"a11y_bp_quality_rating":"{num}级（最高品质评级为5级）","a11y_bp_star_rating_2":"{num_stars}星（最高5星）","a11y_companion_response_helpful":"将回复标记为有帮助","a11y_companion_response_unhelpful":"将回复标记为无帮助","a11y_genai_nav_button_close":"关闭此聊天","a11y_genai_nav_button_go_back":"返回聊天","a11y_lp_spinner_loading_generic":"加载中","a11y_preferred_programme_new_tooltip_preferred":"这家是主推住宿。主推住宿符合{b_companyname}的品质标准，并向{b_companyname}付费参加此项目。","a11y_preferred_programme_tooltip":"该住宿已加入我们的主推合作伙伴项目，致力于提供优质的服务和良好的性价比。如你下单预订，该住宿将向我们多支付一点佣金。","a11y_vm_sr_rt_generic_price_currency":"价格{generic_price_with_currency}","a11y_vm_sr_rt_original_current_price_currency":"原价{original_price_with_currency}，现价{current_price_with_currency}","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_header":"AI聊天使用条款","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_intro":"本使用条款适用于您访问或使用Booking.com在我们的平台上为您提供的Booking.com生成式AI聊天功能（以下简称“AI聊天”）。如果您不同意本使用条款的任何部分，请勿与Booking.com的AI聊天进行互动。","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_intro_2":"除非本文中另有定义，本使用条款中使用的所有大写字母术语均与{start_link}此处{end_link}Booking.com词典中所载的含义相同。","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_1":"{start_bold}1.年龄要求。{end_bold} 您必须年满18周岁才能使用AI聊天。","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_2":"{start_bold}2.我们对个人数据的使用。{end_bold} 在与Booking.com的AI聊天互动时，您无需共享任何有关您本人或他人的个人详细信息或敏感信息（以下简称“个人数据”）。但是，如果您选择与Booking.com的AI聊天共享任何个人数据，Booking.com可能会使用该信息，并将其与您的搜索和预订历史、过往旅行信息以及我们根据您在平台上的在线行为得出的推断相结合，为您的问题提供量身定制的回复，包括基于您的位置（GPS和IP地址）。我们可能还会使用上述信息来开发、训练和微调我们的AI系统，并以其他方式改进我们的产品和服务，但是我们采取了一些技术措施来限制我们所收集的已披露个人数据的数量。如果您在与Booking.com的AI聊天互动时没有共享任何个人数据，我们仍可借助在线标识符以及您的会话和搜索历史来回答您的问题，并管理开放聊天会话，以便您能够在合理期限内恢复会话。为了与您互动，Booking.com的AI聊天将与提供并支持AI聊天的第三方供应商共享您的问题。在与Booking.com的AI聊天互动时，请勿共享任何您不希望Booking.com保留、使用和共享的有关您本人或他人的信息。请阅读我们的{start_link_1}隐私声明{end_link_1}，进一步了解Booking.com如何处理个人数据以及您如何行使隐私权（参见{start_link_2}我们如何使用人工智能和做出自动化决定{end_link_2}）。","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_3":"{start_bold}3.机器生成的输出。{end_bold} 请注意，您收到的所有回复均由机器生成而非人工撰写。这些回复中可能包含错误。虽然部分输出基于在Booking.com上提供的内容（参见下文第5条），但回复通常基于第三方服务供应商提供的公开信息（其准确性未经Booking.com核实），以及您、其他旅客和我们的合作伙伴提供的信息。请注意，回复可能会提供Booking.com上未提供的内容或涉及Booking.com上未提供的服务。您是与旨在根据您的输入提供自动回复的AI进行互动。此类输出不一定代表Booking.com的观点，也不应归因于Booking.com。尽管Booking.com的AI聊天经过海量数据的训练，能够生成逼真的回复，但其不具备独立思考或决策的能力，可能会生成意想不到和不准确的回复。在使用AI聊天时，请牢记这一点。","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_4":"{start_bold}4.持续改善。{end_bold} 我们致力于持续改善AI聊天，以提升用户体验。作为持续努力的一部分，您可能会注意到某些特征或功能可能会随时间而变化。这可能意味着您之前访问过的某些特征可能不再可用，或者您可能会发现新的或经过修改的特征。虽然我们努力提供始终如一的用户体验，但这些更新也是产品和服务改进目标的一部分。请注意，您的体验可能会根据您使用的版本或更新而略有不同。","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_5":"{start_bold}5.推荐。{end_bold} 您看到的所有旅行体验推荐均由Booking.com生成，并可通过Booking.com预订，但具体视供应情况而定。如要查看某项推荐的所有预订选项，只需点击轮播卡片。我们建议您在预订前核对所选选项的信息。请注意，我们提供的AI聊天仅供私人使用（包括休闲和商务旅行），您同意不会将其用于任何商业目的。AI聊天使用了每项“旅行体验”下的相关条款E的“我们的业务(HWW)”页面（{start_link}此处{end_link}）中所述的推荐系统。我们将根据您的搜索条件（您在此界面提出的问题）和其他因素（如HWW页面所述）为您显示相关推荐。我们使用AI来解读您的搜索条件，并匹配最相关的推荐。如果您点击轮播中的某个推荐，将跳转到我们平台上的搜索结果页面。您选择的推荐将固定在搜索结果的顶部，系统将在固定推荐的下方以默认排名和排序显示其他结果，这一点在相关条款E中在我们的HWW页面中也有说明。","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_6":"{start_bold}6.内容。{end_bold} Booking.com的AI聊天用户对其与AI聊天共享的内容和信息以及根据AI聊天提供的信息做出的决定全权负责。与AI聊天互动，即表示针对您与AI聊天共享的内容和信息，您确认：","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_6_part_2":"Booking.com可能会根据其{start_link}内容标准和指南{end_link}对您的内容进行审核。","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_6_part_3":"我们可将通过AI聊天获得的所有输入、输出以及推荐、反馈、评论、想法、提案和改进建议用于任何商业目的，无需受到任何限制，也无需向您支付任何报酬。在AI聊天用户与Booking.com之间，Booking.com对AI聊天拥有所有权利（包括所有知识产权），并且在适用法律允许的范围内，对通过Booking.com的AI聊天产生的内容和信息拥有所有权利。","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_6a":"a.您可以与我们共享该内容和信息；","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_6b":"b.该内容和信息不含任何病毒；","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_6c":"c.该内容和信息没有侵犯他人的隐私权或所有权；","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_6d":"d.您对因该内容和信息而向Booking.com提出的任何法律索赔全权负责；","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_6e":"e.我们可以将该内容和信息用于进一步的商业目的，包括用于促销活动以及构建、定制、提供或增强我们现有和未来的产品和服务；并且","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_6f":"f.该内容和信息符合Booking.com的{start_link}内容标准和指南{end_link}。","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_7":"{start_bold}7.免责声明和保证。{end_bold} Booking.com的AI聊天“按原样”提供，我们不对AI聊天或通过AI聊天生成的内容做出任何承诺，包括关于适销性、特定用途适用性、合格品质或不侵权的承诺。我们无法保证AI聊天或其提供的信息和推荐将不会中断、始终适当、准确、无错误，或者能够满足您的期望；也无法保证由AI聊天处理或生成的任何内容将是安全的、不会丢失或被篡改。在某些国家/地区，根据法律法规，您可能拥有任何公司条款都无法凌驾于其上的权利和保障，本条款的任何内容均无意排除此类权利或保障。","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_8":"{start_bold}8.责任。{end_bold} AI聊天的使用受Booking.com{start_link}客户服务条款{end_link}第A19条“责任限制”的约束。","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_9":"{start_bold}9.一般条款。{end_bold} ,"fx_piyoc_funnel_room_table":"已转换为{user_currency}价格","fx_room_table_currency_tooltip":"价格已从{property_currency}转换而来，并根据我们的最新汇率显示估算值。","loc_hp_map_introduce_filters_entry":"筛选条件","location_www_pp_map_sbox_placeholder_iteration_one":"距离...有多远？","location_www_pp_map_sbox_under_body":"输入你想参观的博物馆、公园或其他地点，查看从该住宿步行或乘坐公共交通前往的距离。","location_www_pp_map_sbox_under_title":"距离...有多远？","sr_show_on_map_top":"在地图上查看","a11y_we_price_match_checklist":"申请条件","a11y_we_price_match_no_claim":"不可申请","loc_row_legal_copy_no_cc_fees":"Booking.com不会向客人收取任何预订手续费，客人将按照Booking.com上显示的价格直接向住宿方支付房费。Booking.com上所显示的价格不包含其他附加费用（包括但不限于当地税费及货币兑换汇率差额等）。","low_rates":"低廉的价格","no_booking_fees":"不收取预订手续费","pd_pdi_index_popup_wpm_bullet_5_6_legal_update":"其他网站的预订属于会员或奖励项目。此类预订指的是客人因不止一次预订、登录帐号、输入优惠码、推荐其他客人或其他操作导致所显示原价的变动，从住宿或其他网站获取更低价格作为奖励的情况。","pdi_index_popup_wpm_bullet_1":"其他网站所提供的预订必须为同一住宿且住宿类型相同。","pdi_index_popup_wpm_bullet_2":"其他网站的预订链接必须与您订单的入住日与退房日完全相同。","pdi_index_popup_wpm_bullet_3":"其他网站的预订链接必须与您订单的取消政策及预订条款完全相同。","pdi_index_popup_wpm_bullet_4":"完成预订之前您无法通过其他网站确定住宿类型或房型。","pdi_index_popup_wpm_bullet_bbasic":"您的当前Booking.com订单是代理商房价，即在我们平台上此价格带有“代理商房价”标签（这些价格由Booking.com合作公司提供）或者您是将其他价格与我们平台的这些代理商房价比较。","pdi_index_popup_wpm_checklist_contact_2":"您需要向我们提供其他网站的预订链接，在我们的工作人员核查时，该链接所提供的预订信息须仍然在线有效且可预订。","pdi_index_popup_wpm_contact":"记住，预订后请至少在您入住日前24小时与我们联系。","pdi_index_wpm_popup_cant_claim":"什么情况下无法申请差价补偿？","pdi_index_wpm_popup_checklist":"申请差价补偿条件对照表","pdi_index_wpm_popup_desc":"{startBold}如果您在其他网站发现能够以更低的价格预订相同的房型，您即可申请差价补偿。{endBold}","pp_bpg_fancy_tooltip_found_cheaper":"别处找到了更便宜的价格？差价核实后将予以补偿！","pp_index_popup_bpg_how_to_1":"发现别家网站提供更便宜的预订价格？","pp_index_popup_bpg_how_to_2":"在您的订单确认页面或前往{start_format}查看所有订单{end_format}页面，点击{start_format}发现别家网站价格更便宜？{end_format}。","pp_index_popup_bpg_how_to_3":"还没有帐号？您可以通过您的订单编号和PIN码登录。","pp_index_popup_bpg_how_to_4":"你也可以联系我们的{start_link}客服{end_link}团队","pp_index_usp_we_price_match":"价格更放心","vm_wpm_popup_cheaper_elsewhere_1":"在确认页面上查找“发现此客房在其他网站更便宜？”。","vm_wpm_popup_cheaper_elsewhere_2":"验证更便宜的房价是否满足所有要求（查看清单）。","vm_wpm_popup_cheaper_elsewhere_3":"保存指向更便宜的房价的链接（示例：www.hotel.com/93203920）。","vm_wpm_popup_cheaper_elsewhere_4":"截取一张（或多张）屏幕截图，确保捕获了所有相关数据（查看清单）。","vm_wpm_popup_cheaper_elsewhere_5":"联系客户服务。","vm_wpm_popup_cheaper_elsewhere_6":"申请确认后，我们将修改预订价格（如有可能）或提供进一步说明，以便您在入住后申请差价退款。","vm_wpm_popup_cheaper_elsewhere_7":"Booking.com保留自行确定客户是否有资格获得“价格更放心优惠”的权利。","vm_wpm_popup_cheaper_elsewhere_header":"在其他网站发现比您预订的客房更便宜的客房？","vm_wpm_popup_checklist_1":"其他优惠必须针对相同的住宿和住宿类型。","vm_wpm_popup_checklist_2":"其他优惠的入住和退房日期必须相同。","vm_wpm_popup_checklist_3":"其他优惠必须具有相同的取消政策和条件。","vm_wpm_popup_checklist_4":"其他优惠必须适用于相同人数的客人。","vm_wpm_popup_checklist_5":"其他优惠必须具有相同的附加服务/膳食计划。","vm_wpm_popup_checklist_6":"更好的优惠必须以住宿的当地货币为单位。","vm_wpm_popup_checklist_header":"“价格更放心”清单","vm_wpm_popup_desc_1":"{startBold}如果您在其他网站发现能够以更低的价格预订相同的房型，您即可申请差价补偿。{endBold}","vm_wpm_popup_desc_2":"预订后请记得联系我们。如果您通过电子邮件提交“价格更放心”申请，则需要向我们提供屏幕截图和其他报价的链接。您也可以直接通过电话联系我们的客服提交“价格更放心”申请。无论如何，其他报价必须在线且在我们查看时可订。","vm_wpm_popup_header":"价格更放心","vm_wpm_popup_no_claim_1":"如果其他优惠在网站上没有透露您将在预订前入住的住宿或住宿类型。","vm_wpm_popup_no_claim_2":"如果其他优惠在不透明、可疑网站和/或可能是欺诈性网站的网站上提供。","vm_wpm_popup_no_claim_3":"如果其他优惠是忠诚度或奖励计划的一部分，其中住宿或网站会因重复业务、登录、使用优惠券代码、推荐他人或任何其他降低原价的行为而降低价格。","vm_wpm_popup_no_claim_4":"如果您当前的Booking.com预订是“代理商房价”（这些订单在我们的平台上标明，由合作伙伴公司提供），或者您将其他优惠与我们平台上的“代理商房价”进行比较。","vm_wpm_popup_no_claim_5":"如果您取消预订。","vm_wpm_popup_no_claim_6":"如果您预订的是单元房住宿，此类住宿本质上是其他地方无法提供的。","vm_wpm_popup_no_claim_7":"Booking.com保留自行确定客户是否有资格获得“价格更放心优惠”的权利。","vm_wpm_popup_no_claim_header":"您在何种情况下无法提出申请？","a11y_sr_close_banner":"点击关闭消息","bhqc_guest_feedback_loop_17":"从住宿设施、面积、位置和服务等方面衡量，{b_companyname}给予这家住宿的品质评级为{property_rating}级（共5级）。","bhqc_sr_qc_desc_tooltip_affiliate":"与本站其他民宿短租相比，本住宿被评为{num_rating}级（最高5级）。该品质评级是根据住客评分、设施、面积、位置和服务综合评定的。","bhqc_tooltip_star_rating_explanation_how_we_work_link":"{start_link}前往“{page_name}”页面了解更多{end_link}","deals_index_hero_blackfriday2022_countdown_days":"距离活动结束还剩{num_days}天","deals_index_hero_blackfriday2022_countdown_timer":"距离活动结束还剩{countdown}","genius_vip_mlp_onboarding_discover_benefits_bottom_sheet_page_cta":"知道了","genius_vip_pm_hp_ending_time":"{end_date}结束","genius_vip_pm_lp_how_it_works_1_des":"截至你入住前{num}天，如果订单在{b_companyname}降价，我们将会通知你。","genius_vip_pm_lp_how_it_works_1_title":"获取价格更新","genius_vip_pm_lp_how_it_works_2_des":"完成入住后约14天，差价会以积分形式添加至你的钱包。","genius_vip_pm_lp_how_it_works_2_title":"自动获取积分","genius_vip_pm_lp_how_it_works_3_des":"积分可以用于在我们网站预订行程中的各项产品，仅需在付款时选择“钱包支付”。","genius_vip_pm_lp_how_it_works_3_title":"下次预订可省钱","genius_vip_pm_upper_funnel_cta":"活动详情","genius_vip_pm_upper_funnel_title":"降价了？差价我们补","hww_how_we_work":"我们如何运作","identity_genius_meta_rates_web_pp_banner_description":"只需登录或免费注册，即可在这家Genius住宿立享优惠","identity_genius_meta_rates_web_pp_banner_title":"解锁会员专属价格","web_ge_generic_signature_with_link":"{b_companyname}会员奖励计划。{start_link}了解详情{end_link}","web_ge_generic_signature_without_link":"{b_companyname}会员奖励计划","hp_description_hotel_chain_brand":"连锁酒店/品牌","fam_bp_policies_add_children":"当前价格适用于搜索的成人数。如带儿童出行，请添加儿童查看确切价格和入住信息。","fam_bp_policies_check_children":"当前价格适用于你搜索的成人和儿童人数。儿童人数和年龄将影响所显示价格，请确保添加无误。","fam_pp_policies_add_children":"如需查看确切价格和入住信息，请在搜索条件中添加同行儿童人数和年龄。","fam_pp_policies_check_children":"如需查看确切价格和入住信息，请确保在搜索条件中添加的儿童人数和年龄准确无误。","fam_pp_policies_children_age_limit":"欢迎{num}岁（含）以上儿童入住","fam_pp_policies_children_not_welcome":"不接待儿童入住","fam_pp_policies_children_welcome":"欢迎任何年龄的儿童入住","fam_pp_policy_ceb_bed_avail":"所有加床需视供应情况而定。","fam_pp_policy_ceb_bed_nocot":"该住宿不提供婴儿床。","fam_pp_policy_ceb_bed_price":"加床价格不包含在总价内，需到店另行支付。","fam_pp_policy_ceb_bed_request":"{start_bold}加床{end_bold}（按需提供）","fam_pp_policy_ceb_bed_rule":"允许的加床数量取决于您的选项。请查看所选房型获取更多信息。","fam_pp_policy_ceb_both_avail":"所有婴儿床及加床需视供应情况而定。","fam_pp_policy_ceb_both_price":"婴儿床和加床价格不包含在总价内，需到店另行支付。","fam_pp_policy_ceb_both_rule":"允许的加床和婴儿床数量取决于您的选项。请查看所选房型获取更多信息。","fam_pp_policy_ceb_cot_avail":"所有婴儿床需视供应情况而定。","fam_pp_policy_ceb_cot_nobed":"该住宿不提供加床。","fam_pp_policy_ceb_cot_price":"婴儿床价格不包含在总价内，需到店另行支付。","fam_pp_policy_ceb_cot_request":"{start_bold}婴儿床{end_bold}（按需提供）","fam_pp_policy_ceb_cot_rule":"允许添加的婴儿床数量取决于您的选项。请查看所选房型获取更多信息。","fam_pp_policy_ceb_none":"该住宿不提供婴儿床和加床。","fam_pp_policy_children_adult_rate":"年满{num}岁的儿童入住该住宿将按成人收费。","fam_pp_policy_children_cotbed_header":"婴儿床和加床政策","fam_pp_policy_children_general_header":"一般儿童政策","fam_pp_policy_children_occupancy_warning":"如果您与{num}岁以下的儿童一起入住，请选择列明儿童入住人数的房价，以确保支付正确的价格。","fam_pp_rc_policy_request":"选定房型开始预订后，你可在下一步提出请求。","famex_m_hp_cpv2_price_mode_free":"免费","famex_m_hp_cpv2_room_crib_and_extra_bed":"可应住客要求提供{num_cot}张婴儿床","famex_m_hp_cpv2_room_crib_and_extra_bed_request":"和{num_bed}张加床。","famex_m_hp_cpv2_room_crib_only":"可应住客要求提供{num_cot}张婴儿床。","famex_m_hp_cpv2_room_crib_or_extra_bed":"可应住客要求提供{num_cot}张婴儿床","famex_m_hp_cpv2_room_crib_or_extra_bed_request":"或{num_bed}张加床。","famex_m_hp_cpv2_room_extra_bed_only":"可应住客要求提供{num_bed}张加床。","famex_m_hp_cpv2_room_no_crib_or_extra_bed":"不提供婴儿床和加床。","loc_core_beds_age_min_max":"{age_min} culture, as well as visitor etiquette","510":"Provide guests with information regarding local ecosystems, heritage and culture, as well as visitor etiquette","511":"室内壁炉","512":"所有外墙、屋顶和天花板均隔热","513":"客房和公共区域的所有窗户均配有自动遮阳帘","514":"所有电梯都有“待机”模式","515":"所有泳池均配有变速热泵","516":"所有泳池均配有泳池盖，减少蒸发并保留热量","517":"所有毛巾和床单的洗涤温度最高为60°C/140°F","518":"冷却系统仅使用碳氢化合物或天然制冷剂","519":"今年的能源消耗比去年减少至少5%","520":"所有恒温调节器经过设定，可在客房或公共区域不使用时节省能源","521":"所有客房、厨房、洗衣房和前台/办公室均配备并使用至少一台节能电器","522":"危险废弃物得到安全处理和处置","523":"前台和后台均实行无纸化流程","524":"聚苯乙烯食品包装","525":"参与肥皂捐赠计划","526":"用过的灯泡得到安全处理","527":"景观绿化采用耐旱植物","528":"收集雨水并用于浇灌土地、植物和作物","529":"住宿内的所有水龙头均节水","530":"仅使用在整个使用周期内不会危害环境的清洁产品","531":"客房内仅提供在整个使用周期内不会危害环境的洗浴用品","532":"所有海鲜在保护栖息地和受威胁物种的前提下捕获，并为海洋留下足够的鱼类","533":"景观绿化优先考虑本土植物，避免入侵物种","534":"为员工提供健康和安全培训","535":"员工工资受到监测、审查并等于或高于平均最低工资或全国生活工资","537":"用过的灯泡得到安全处理","539":"聚苯乙烯食品包装","540":"景观绿化采用耐旱植物","hotelfacility_187":"升高式马桶","other":""}},"hp_desktop_facilities_list_closed_multiple_dates":"（暂时关闭）","hp_facilities_hotels_lang_1":"使用的语言","hp_facilities_sw_all_ages":"不限年龄","hp_facilities_sw_kids_only":"适合儿童","hp_facilities_sw_open_all_year":"全年开放","hp_facilities_sw_opening_time":"开放时间","hp_facilities_sw_rooftop":"屋顶泳池","hp_facilities_sw_seasonal":"季节性开放","hp_free":"免费！","ls_wifi_basic_free_popular_title":"基础免费WiFi（{speed}兆比特每秒）","ls_wifi_basic_free_popular_tooltip":"该住宿提供基础免费WiFi。其网速适用于流媒体内容以及视频通话，且已经过房东的测试。","ls_wifi_basic_paid_popular_all_areas_title":"全区域提供基础WiFi（{speed}兆比特每秒）","ls_wifi_basic_paid_popular_all_areas_tooltip":"该住宿全区域提供基础WiFi。其网速适用于流媒体内容以及视频通话，且已经过房东的测试。","ls_wifi_basic_paid_popular_title":"基础WiFi（{speed}兆比特每秒）","ls_wifi_basic_paid_popular_tooltip":"该住宿提供基础WiFi。其网速适用于流媒体内容以及视频通话，且已经过房东的测试。","ls_wifi_fast_free_popular_title":"高速免费WiFi（{speed}兆比特每秒）","ls_wifi_fast_free_popular_tooltip":"该住宿提供高速免费WiFi。其网速适用于流媒体4K内容和在多个设备上视频通话，且已经房东的测试。","ls_wifi_fast_paid_popular_all_areas_title":"全区域提供高速WiFi（{speed}兆比特每秒）","ls_wifi_fast_paid_popular_all_areas_tooltip":"该住宿全区域提供高速WiFi。其网速适用于流媒体4K内容和在多个设备上视频通话，且已经房东的测试。","ls_wifi_fast_paid_popular_title":"高速WiFi（{speed}兆比特每秒）","ls_wifi_fast_paid_popular_tooltip":"该住宿提供高速WiFi。其网速适用于流媒体4K内容和在多个设备上视频通话，且已经房 格陵兰语","gu":"古吉拉特语","guarani":"瓜拉尼语","gujarati":"古吉拉特语","ha":"豪萨语","he":"希伯来语","hi":"印地语","hr":"克罗地亚语","hu":"匈牙利语","hy":"亚美尼亚语","id":"印尼语","is":"冰岛语","it":"意大利语","ja":"日语","javanese":"爪哇语","jv":"爪哇语","ka":"格鲁吉亚语","kannada":"卡纳达语","kl":" 格陵兰语","km":"高棉语（柬埔寨语）","kn":"卡纳达语","ko":"韩语","lo":"老挝语","lt":"立陶宛语","lv":"拉脱维亚语","macedonian":"马其顿语","malayalam":"马拉雅拉姆语","mandarin":"普通话","marathi":"马拉地语","mk":"马其顿语","ml":"马拉雅拉姆语","mn":"蒙古语","mo":"摩尔多瓦语","montenegrin":"黑山语","mr":"马拉地语","ms":"马来语","mt":"马耳他语","my":"缅甸语","ne":"尼泊尔语","nl":"荷兰语","no":"挪威语","odia":"奥里亚语","or":"奥里亚语","other":"","pa":"旁遮普语","pl":"波兰语","pt":"葡萄牙语","punjabi":"旁遮普语","ro":"罗马尼亚语","ru":"俄语","sk":"斯洛伐克语","sl":"斯洛文尼亚语","sq":"阿尔巴尼亚语","sr":"塞尔维亚语","sv":"瑞典语","sw":"斯瓦西里语","ta":"泰米尔语","tamil":"泰米尔语","te":"泰卢固语","telugu":"泰卢固语","th":"泰语","tl":"菲律宾语","tr":"土耳其语","uk":"乌克兰语","ur":"乌尔都语","urdu":"乌尔都语","vi":"越南语","xh":"科萨语","yo":"约鲁巴语","yu":"粤语","yue":"粤语","zh":"中文","zu":"祖鲁语"}},"ugcd_prop_page_adj_facilities_tooltip":"评分：{num_score}（来自{num_reviews}条点评）","web_fame_guaranteed_cot_always_av_free":"随时提供免费婴儿床","a11y_ugc_web_mdot_guidelines_close":"关闭点评规则","a11y_ugc_web_mdot_guidelines_open":"打开点评规则","guest_reviews_disclaimer":"住客评语反映的是 {b_companyname}的客人在酒店住宿后对该酒店的个人意见和看法。这些意见和看法并不一定代表 {b_companyname} 的观点。","mdot_ugc_review_guidelines_entry_point":"查看点评规则","reviews_ugc_vision_principles_update_10":"{start_style}所有原创内容都必须与旅行相关。{end_style}越是详细的点评越能帮助其他客人更好地挑选自己喜欢的住宿。请勿在这些原创内容内附上个人信息、带有政治色彩、与伦理道德相关、或宗教性内容。促销活动信息将会被删除，不予显示。任何涉及{b_companyname}服务的相关问题都将转交客服团队及合作伙伴服务团队处理。","reviews_ugc_vision_principles_update_11":"{start_style}所有原创内容应尽量面向全球用户。{end_style}请勿使用任何不敬或亵渎性的词汇（及其变形或网络用语形式），不分语种。严禁发布任何带有憎恨性、歧视性、威胁、色情、暴力和煽动违法行为的点评及媒体。","reviews_ugc_vision_principles_update_12":"{start_style}所有内容均应由用户原创，且独一无二。{end_style}真实且中肯的点评对其他用户最有帮助。您提交的内容应为您自己的原创。{b_companyname}的合作伙伴不得代表住客发表内容，或向客人提供任何形式的报酬以换取好评。严禁合作伙伴在竞争对手住宿页面提交恶意负面点评，拉低对方的综合评分。","reviews_ugc_vision_principles_update_13_new":"{start_bold}尊重他人的隐私{end_bold}-避免您的帖子包含个人数据，如姓名、电话号码、电子邮箱地址和有关他人的其他信息。","reviews_ugc_vision_principles_update_13_new1":"{start_bold}尊重知识产权{end_bold}–确保您拥有或有权使用您发布的内容中可能存在的任何知识产权（尤其是图片）。","reviews_ugc_vision_principles_update_14":"{start_style}任何{b_companyname}用户及合作伙伴在这些原创内容中表达的观点，均属于其个人观点，与{b_companyname}无关。{b_companyname}对任何点评或点评回复不负任何责任。{b_companyname}仅为这些点评和点评回复提供发布平台，不负责验证。{end_style}","reviews_ugc_vision_principles_update_5_b":"系统将默认根据点评时间以及其他条件，优先显示相关性最高的点评内容。其他条件包括但不限于：用户语言、文字点评、非匿名点评。系统可能会提供其他排序方式（例如按旅行者类型、按评分等）。","reviews_ugc_vision_principles_update_8":"{start_style}用户点评的规范及准则{end_style}","reviews_ugc_vision_principles_update_9":"这些规范及准则将确保用户原创内容与{b_companyname}相关，内容恰当，且不含不雅词汇，即使是好评，也同样适用以上准则。","ugc_reviews_disclaimer_translations":"此服务可能包含由谷歌翻译的内容。对于翻译，谷歌不作任何明示或暗示保证（包括任何准确度、可靠性的任何保证，以及适销性、针对某一特定用途的适用性和不侵犯第三方权利的任何暗示保证）。","ugc_reviews_disclaimer_translations_header":"翻译免责声明","ugcd_rb_real_review_v1":"我们对所有点评进行真实性审核。","ugcd_rb_real_review_v2":"所有点评都已通过真实性审核。","ugcd_rb_real_review_v3":"我们会实时审核所有住客点评。","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_body1":"每条住客评分在1到10分之间。为了得出所示的综合评分，我们会将收到的所有住客评分相加，然后将这个总和除以我们收到点评数量。我们使用加权点评系统，这意味着点评越新，对总评分的计算影响就越大。此外，住客还可以单独在一些重要方面打出“单项评分”，例如：位置、清洁度、工作人员、舒适度、设施、性价比以及免费WiFi。请注意，住客打出的单项评分与综合评分是分别单独提交的，所以两者之间没有直接联系。","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_body2":"如果您入住了在我们的平台预订的住宿，或者您曾到店但并未实际入住，都可以对该住宿进行点评。如需编辑已提交的点评，请联系我们的客服。","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_body3":"我们拥有人工和自动系统来专门甄别提交至我们平台的虚假点评。如经发现，我们会将其删除，并在必要时对相关责任人采取行动。","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_body4":"此外，无论谁发现可疑内容都可向我们的客服团队报告，我们的防欺诈团队会跟进调查。","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_body5":"理想情况下，无论是好评还是差评，我们会发布每一条收到的点评。但是，我们不会展示（在其它内容中）包含或涉及以下内容的任何评论：","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_body6":"为了确保点评的相关性，我们可能只接受退房后3个月内提交的点评，如果所示点评超过36个月，或者住宿发生所有权变更，我们可能会停止显示相关点评。","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_body7":"住宿可选择对点评做出回应。","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_body8":"如果您看到有多个点评，最新的点评会显示在最顶部，但也取决于其他几个因素（例如点评采用的语言、点评仅有评分还是也包括评论等）。您还可以按需对点评进行排序和/或筛选（例如按照一年中的时间、点评评分等）。","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_body9":"我们有时会展示来自其他知名旅行网站的外部评分。如有，我们将明确说明。","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_bullet1":"政治敏感评论","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_bullet2":"促销内容","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_bullet3":"非法活动","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_bullet4":"个人或敏感信息（如电邮、电话号码或信用卡资料）","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_bullet5":"脏话、性暗示、仇恨言论、歧视性言论、威胁或涉及暴力的内容","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_bullet6":"垃圾邮件和虚假内容","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_bullet7":"虐待动物","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_bullet8":"假冒/仿冒（如：假冒他人写评论）","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_bullet9":"任何违反我们{start_link}点评指南{end_link}的内容。","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_header":"住客点评如何运作","ugcx_reviewlist_tagline_legal3":"我们力求100%真实点评","a11y_ugc_desktop_categories_hint":"点评类别","a11y_cta_close_banner_new":"关闭横幅","a11y_rev_sum_close_form":"关闭反馈界面","a11y_reviews_change_filter":"筛选选项已更改","a11y_reviews_change_sorters":"排序选项已更改","a11y_reviews_close_review_modal":"关闭住宿点评","a11y_reviews_close_write_review_modal":"关闭撰写点评选项","a11y_reviews_search_clear_label":"清除搜索栏","a11y_rl_ugc_image":"用户已上传{in_city_name}{property_name}的照片","a11y_srx_mark_review_helpful":"将来自{reviewer_country}的{reviewer_name}的点评标为有帮助。","a11y_srx_mark_review_not_helpful":"将来自{reviewer_country}的{reviewer_name}的点评标为没有帮助。","a11y_ugc_review_card_accom_response":"住宿回复","a11y_ugc_review_card_item":"点评卡","a11y_ugc_review_card_review":"点评","a11y_ugc_review_card_reviewer":"点评人","a11y_ugc_review_list_magnifying_gl erty_name}客房内的一张或多张双层床","15":"{property_name}的庭院或其他户外区域","16":"{property_name}外面的花园","17":"{property_name}的阳台或露台","18":"{property_name}的门面或入口","19":"{/hoteltype_new/[property_type_id]/the_name_nominative_singular_lc}所在大楼","20":"{property_name}内部或周边的泳池","21":"{/hoteltype_new/[property_type_id]/the_name_nominative_singular_lc}周边的地标","22":"{/hoteltype_new/[property_type_id]/the_name_nominative_singular_lc}周边环境","23":"{/hoteltype_new/[property_type_id]/the_name_nominative_singular_lc}周边自然景观","24":"{property_name}鸟瞰图","25":"{/hoteltype_new/[property_type_id]/the_name_nominative_singular_lc}旁或附近的海滩","26":"在{/hoteltype_new/[property_type_id]/the_name_nominative_singular_lc}或周边看到的日出或日落","27":"{city_name}景观或在{/hoteltype_new/[property_type_id]/the_name_nominative_singular_lc}看到的城市景观","28":"{property_name}内部或周边的花园景观","29":"山景或在{/hoteltype_new/[property_type_id]/the_name_nominative_singular_lc}看到的山景","30":"在{/hoteltype_new/[property_type_id]/the_name_nominative_singular_lc}看到的景观","31":"{/hoteltype_new/[property_type_id]/the_name_nominative_singular_lc}附近的河景","32":"海景或在{/hoteltype_new/[property_type_id]/the_name_nominative_singular_lc}看到的海景","33":"{property_name}内部或周边泳池景观","34":"{/hoteltype_new/[property_type_id]/the_name_nominative_singular_lc}附近的湖景","35":"{property_name}商务区和/或会议室","36":"{property_name}的健身中心和/或健身设施","37":"{/hoteltype_new/[property_type_id]/the_name_nominative_singular_lc}提供给客人使用的烧烤设施","38":"{/hoteltype_new/[property_type_id]/the_name_nominative_singular_lc}内部图书馆","39":"{/hoteltype_new/[property_type_id]/the_name_nominative_singular_lc}内部或周边的超市或其他商店","40":"{property_name}Spa和/或其他健康设施","41":"在{/hoteltype_new/[property_type_id]/the_name_nominative_singular_lc}或周边钓鱼","42":"{/hoteltype_new/[property_type_id]/the_name_nominative_singular_lc}内部或周边高尔夫设施","43":"在{/hoteltype_new/[property_type_id]/the_name_nominative_singular_lc}或周边骑马","44":"在{/hoteltype_new/[property_type_id]/the_name_nominative_singular_lc}或周边滑雪","45":"{property_name}内部或周边的网球和/或壁球设施","46":"在{/hoteltype months.","rev_sum_mvp_title":"住客点评摘要","review_display_hotel_response":"酒店回复：","review_display_property_response":"住宿方回复：","review_helpful_vote_button_confirmed":"有用","review_helpful_vote_number_people_bold":"{start_bold}{number_people}人{end_bold}认为这条点评有用","review_helpful_vote_you_and_others_bold":"{start_bold}你和另外{number_people}人{end_bold}认为这条点评有用","review_helpful_vote_you_bold":"{start_bold}你{end_bold}认为这条点评有用","review_thanks_for_your_patience_name":"{user_first_name}，感谢您点评{property_name}！","review_thanks_for_your_patience_nameless":"感谢您点评{property_name}！","review_thanks_for_your_patience_subheader":"您的{num}条点评通过我们的{start_link}审核{end_link}后即可显示在这里","showing":"显示","ugc_accessibility_filter_reviews":"筛选点评","ugc_d_hp_reviews_select_topics":"选择相关主题浏览点评：","ugc_guest_reviews_list_title":"{property_name}的住客点评","ugc_guest_stories_reviewed_date":"点评日期：{date}","ugc_hp_review_tab_filters_no_results":"没有符合筛选条件的点评。","ugc_hp_review_tab_filters_no_results_show_all":"显示所有点评","ugc_review_page_booked_for":"预订了{nominative_month_year}入住","ugc_review_page_non_stayed_label":"未完成入住","ugc_review_page_non_stayed_label_tooltip":"评论人未在住宿入住或仅入住了预订的部分晚数。","ugc_review_tab_search_reviews_cta":"搜索","ugcd_gen_ai_summary_based_on_reviews":"基于{num_reviews}条住客点评","ugcd_search_ai_comp_placeholder1":"试试“泳池”、“早餐”、“停车”或其他您可能感兴趣的方面。","ugcd_search_ai_comp_placeholder2":"搜索相关主题以查看点评…","ugcd_search_ai_comp_title1":"按主题搜索住客点评","ugcd_search_ai_comp_title2":"查找您关心的内容","ugcx_desktop_reviews_overview_all":"查看所有点评","ugcx_guest_reviews_num_nights":"{num}晚","ugcx_reviews_not_helpful":"没用","ugcx_reviews_you_voted_helpful_not":"{start_bold}你{end_bold}认为这条点评没用","pp_sustainability_block_cat_header_community":"目的地和社区","pp_sustainability_block_cat_header_eco":"自然风光","pp_sustainability_block_cat_header_greenhouse":"能源和温室气体","pp_sustainability_block_cat_header_waste":"废弃物","pp_sustainability_block_cat_header_water":"水","pp_sustainability_block_community_art":"为当地艺术家提供展示才华的平台","pp_sustainability_block_community_ecosystem":"为客人提供有关当地生态系统、文化遗产和入乡随俗的信息","pp_sustainability_block_community_invest":"拿出一定比例的收入投资于社区项目或可持续发展项目","pp_sustainability_block_community_tours":"提供由当地导游和公司组织的游览和活动","pp_sustainability_block_eco_green_space":"在住宿内提供绿色空间，如花园/屋顶花园","pp_sustainability_block_eco_organic_food":"提供的大多数食物为有机食物","pp_sustainability_block_eco_wildlife":"住宿圈养的野生（未驯化）动物不可展示/互动，不得剥削、食用或出售。","pp_sustainability_block_greenhouse_bike_parking":"自行车停放","pp_sustainability_block_greenhouse_bike_rent":"自行车租赁","pp_sustainability_block_greenhouse_carbon":"抵消部分碳足迹","pp_sustainability_block_greenhouse_electric_car":"电动车充电站","pp_sustainability_block_greenhouse_energy":"普及使用100%可再生电源","pp_sustainability_block_greenhouse_keycard":"插卡取电或移动感应供电","pp_sustainability_block_greenhouse_lights":"住宿大多数照明使用LED节能灯泡","pp_sustainability_block_greenhouse_seasonal_food":"住宿提供的大多数食物源自当地","pp_sustainability_block_greenhouse_vegan":"提供纯素菜单","pp_sustainability_block_greenhouse_vegetarian_new":"提供素食菜单","pp_sustainability_block_greenhouse_window":"所有窗户均为双层玻璃","pp_sustainability_block_waste_bins":"为客人提供回收垃圾桶，且回收利用废弃物","pp_sustainability_block_waste_drink_bottle":"不使用一次性塑料饮料瓶","pp_sustainability_block_waste_food":"该住宿努力减少食物浪费","pp_sustainability_block_waste_mini_toil":"不使用一次性塑料小瓶洗发水、护发素和沐浴露","pp_sustainability_block_waste_plates":"不使用一次性塑料餐具/盘子","pp_sustainability_block_waste_reusable_cups":"不使用一次性塑料杯","pp_sustainability_block_waste_stirrer":"不使用一次性塑料搅拌棒","pp_sustainability_block_waste_straw":"不使用一次性塑料吸管","pp_sustainability_block_waste_water_bottle":"不使用一次性塑料水瓶","pp_sustainability_block_waste_water_cooler":"饮水机","pp_sustainability_block_water_cleaning":"可选择取消每日客房清洁","pp_sustainability_block_water_shower":"节水淋浴","pp_sustainability_block_water_toilet":"节水马桶","pp_sustainability_block_water_towel":"可选择重复使用毛巾","hp_fine_print_cta":"除上述所列内容之外，{hotel_name}可能会收取其他费用，请点击{start_link}预订须知{end_link}查看详情。","a11y_st_banner_cert_name":"认证名称","a11y_st_cert_modal_close":"返回住宿详情","st_cert_desktop_mdot_pp_header":"可持续措施","st_cert_desktop_mdot_pp_modal_h1":"第三方可持续认证","st_cert_desktop_mdot_pp_modal_h1_body":"在Booking.com，我们致力于让每个人都能更轻松地享受更可持续的旅行。作为这一承诺的一部分，我们重点推荐拥有第三方可持续认证的住宿。","st_cert_desktop_mdot_pp_modal_h2":"它如何运作？","st_cert_desktop_mdot_pp_modal_h2_body":"凡是可持续性努力已获得我们认可的第三方认证的住宿旁边都会带有“可持续性认证”标签。在我们计划的初始阶段，我们优先考虑认可备受推崇的认证，包括全球可持续旅游委员会（GSTC）认可的认证、Swisstainable项目名单、声明符合Travalyst标准的认证以及全球知名的认证，例如ISO、BREEAM和LEED。这项工作得到了由Booking.com委托进行的一项独立研究的支持。","st_cert_desktop_mdot_pp_modal_h3":"这对我来说意味着什么？","st_cert_desktop_mdot_pp_modal_h3_body":"获得这些认证的住宿，都是按照特定标准运营的，为像你这样的客人提供更可持续的入住体验。请直接咨询住宿，了解其正在采取的可持续发展举措。","st_cert_desktop_mdot_pp_modal_h4":"我如何能找到更可持续的住宿？","st_cert_desktop_mdot_pp_modal_h4_body":"您可以使用搜索结果中的“可持续认证”筛选条件来筛选具有认证的住宿。您还可以通过专门的“可持续认证”标签找到这些住宿。","st_cert_desktop_mdot_pp_subheader":"该住宿拥有{num}个第三方可持续认证。{start_link}了解关于认证的更多信息{end_link}","sustainability_certification_subheader":"认证方：","location_hp_surrounding_public_transport_bus":"巴士","location_hp_surrounding_public_transport_metro":"地铁站","location_hp_surrounding_public_transport_train":"火车站","seo_city_hotel_lp_surroundings_block_header":"酒店周边","surroundings_block_header":"住宿周边","surroundings_category_bar_no_colon":"咖啡馆/酒吧","surroundings_category_forest":"森林","surroundings_category_lake_no_colon":"湖泊","surroundings_category_mountain_no_colon":"山川","surroundings_category_peak":"山峰","surroundings_category_restaurant_no_colon":"餐厅","surroundings_category_river_no_colon":"河流","surroundings_category_sea_no_colon":"大海","surroundings_category_waterfall":"瀑布","hp_amenities_header_block":"{start_facilities_style}Amenities{end_facilities_style} of contract for accommodation services entered into through {b_companyname} is made between you (the customer) and the service provider (i.e. the private host, professional host, or business entity) . The service provider, as a party to the contract, is responsible towards you for proper performance of the services. {b_companyname} is a platform through which third parties offer their services (“Service Providers”, including accommodation services) and it solely intermediates the contract between you and the Service Provider. Therefore, {b_companyname} is responsible for obligations related to providing the Platform, and Service Providers are responsible for obligations related to the accommodation services. {start_link}For examples of obligations of {b_companyname} and obligations of Service Providers click here.{end_link}","ugc_uokik_obligations_split_booking_examples_header":"Some examples of obligations of {b_companyname} are:","ugc_uokik_obligations_split_booking_examples_point_four":"make available a Customer Service center aimed at assisting consumers, in cases of problems connected with realisation of accommodation services, for example by contacting the service providers (however, this is a voluntary and facultative activity of {b_companyname} and {b_companyname} does not assume any obligations of accommodation providers).","ugc_uokik_obligations_split_booking_examples_point_one":"providing the functioning of the {b_companyname} service with reasonable professional diligence;","ugc_uokik_obligations_split_booking_examples_point_three":"resolving your complaints connected with the operation of the {b_companyname} service;","ugc_uokik_obligations_split_booking_examples_point_two":"managing your payment and ensuring the completion of your transaction with the Service Provider, as long as {b_companyname} facilitates your payment; ","ugc_uokik_obligations_split_sp_examples_header":"Some examples of obligations of Service Providers are:","ugc_uokik_obligations_split_sp_examples_point_one":"providing the accommodation (service) according to the contract between you and the Service Provider;","ugc_uokik_obligations_split_sp_examples_point_three":"resolving your complaints connected with the availability and quality of the accommodation (e.g. overbooking, room standard, facilities or location).","ugc_uokik_obligations_split_sp_examples_point_two":"managing your payment, as long as the Service Provider accepts your payment directly;","ugc_uokik_obligations_split_title":"Split of 基于{num_reviews}条点评。","ukrainewar_avblock_russia_belarus_crimea_febanner":"当前无法通过Booking.com在该地区预订。","ukrainewar_avblock_russia_belarus_crimea_febanner_affiliate":"当前无法通过我们网站在该地区预订。","a11y_aria_label_close":"关闭","a11y_aria_label_select_dates":"选择日期","a11y_aria_label_select_occupancy":"选择入住人数","a11y_ctsr_search_box_select_age":"选择年龄","a11y_sr_check_in_day_selector":"入住日期","a11y_sr_check_in_month_selector":"入住月份","a11y_sr_check_out_day_selector":"退房日期","a11y_sr_check_out_month_selector":"退房月份","app_va_guest_sbox_pets_checkbox_assist_animals_popup_body_1":"{start_link}经过认证的辅助动物{end_link}是经过严格训练、为行动不便人士提供协助的动物，在帮助行动不便人士安全自信地参与日常任务方面发挥着重要作用。","app_va_guest_sbox_pets_checkbox_assist_animals_popup_body_2":"在许多国家和地区，即使在不接待宠物的情况下，携带辅助动物的旅客也有权预订任何住宿，无需额外费用或附加条件。不同地方对辅助动物的法律要求不同，因此请在出行前了解当地法律。","b4b_onsite_index_guestmodal_toggle_work_question":"差旅出行？","b4b_onsite_index_search_checkbox_work_im":"我要出差","bb_sbox_work_text_4":"为您筛选商旅必备设施服务，早餐、WiFi、免费停车等一键搜索","bh_gwe_privacy_entire_home_tickbox_header_filter":"我正在寻找整租民宿短租或公寓","bh_gwe_privacy_entire_home_tickbox_header_tooltip_filter":"我们将向你展示可以自己整租的住宿","bh_sbox_general_dates_num_weeks":"入住{num_weeks}周","checkin_date":"入住日期","checkout_date":"退房日期","ctsd_ai_search_about_feature_cta":"关于此功能的更多信息","ctsd_ai_search_about_feature_info":"你分享的信息可能会被{b_companyname}用于产品改进（包括开发和训练{b_companyname}的AI模型）。搜索结果基于你、其他用户和我们的合作伙伴向我们提供的信息。请不要分享个人数据。","ctsd_ai_search_drop_menu_suggestions_1":"托斯卡纳海景酒店客房","ctsd_ai_search_drop_menu_suggestions_2":"本周末巴黎游玩指南","ctsd_ai_search_drop_menu_suggestions_3":"曼谷大皇宫附近的青旅","ctsd_ai_search_drop_menu_suggestions_head":"以下是一些入门示例：","ctsd_ai_search_empty_input_error":"输入你的搜索内容","ctsd_ai_search_sbox_placeholder":"尝试搜索“洛杉矶评分最高且配有空调的公寓”","ctsd_ai_search_toggle_advanced_search":"用你自己的话搜索","ctsd_ai_search_toggle_standard_search":"标准搜索","ctsd_ai_search_unidentified_input_error":"我们无法完成你的搜索。请重新表述你的搜索内容，然后再次搜索。","ctso_index_sbox_placeholder_example_1":"试试“带早餐的伦敦酒店”","ctsr_ai_search_popular_searches_head":"热搜目的地","ctsr_search_aro l_proud_badge":"Travel Proud","propex_pp_travel_proud_tooltip":"该住宿已完成Travel Proud培训，因此你可以更加放心地享受舒适的住宿。","a11y_abu_search_reviews_read_more":"阅读更多{reviewer_name}的点评","ugc_d_www_pp_fr_cta0":"查看更多","ugc_d_www_pp_fr_cta1":"分析利弊","ugc_d_www_pp_fr_cta2":"评估优劣","a11y_guest_qna_aria_label_carousel":"旅客问答卡片轮播","a11y_guest_qna_aria_label_explore":"探索问答卡","a11y_guest_qna_aria_label_generic":"问题卡","a11y_guest_qna_aria_label_slide_x_of_y":"第{num1}张卡片，共{num2}张","comp_ugc_read_more_cta":"查看更多","d_rc_q_and_a_helpful":"有用","d_rc_q_and_a_not_helpful":"没用","d_rc_q_and_a_voted_helpful":"{start_bold}你{end_bold}觉得这条回答有用","d_rc_q_and_a_voted_not_helpful":"{start_bold}你{end_bold}觉得这条答案没用","m_propx_pp_qna_ask_question_cta":"提问","m_propx_pp_qna_ask_question_header":"没找到答案？","m_propx_pp_qna_ask_question_subheader":"向住宿发送问题，了解更多。","m_propx_pp_qna_ask_question_subheader_days":"向住宿发送问题，通常他们会在几天内作答。","m_propx_pp_qna_ask_question_subheader_hours":"向住宿发送问题，通常他们会在几小时内作答。","m_propx_pp_qna_ask_question_subheader_mins":"向住宿发送问题，通常他们会在几分钟内作答。","m_propx_pp_qna_asked_about_room":"提问关于：{room_name}","m_propx_pp_qna_last_header":"还想再看看？","m_propx_pp_qna_show_orig":"查看原文","m_propx_pp_qna_show_trans":"查看翻译","m_propx_qna_modal_disclaimer":"您的提问通过审核并得到回复后，会公开显示在{b_companyname}上。{start_link}点击此处查看问题发布准则{end_link}","m_rc_q_and_a_guidelines_1":"{b_companyname}的问答规范准则","m_rc_q_and_a_guidelines_2":"所有问答内容都必须与住宿或客房相关，并且内容越是详细，越能帮助其他客人更好地挑选喜爱的住宿。请勿附上个人信息、带有政治色彩、与伦理道德相关或宗教性的内容。促销活动信息将会被删除，不予显示。任何涉及{b_companyname}服务的相关问题都将转交客服团队及住宿服务团队处理。","m_rc_q_and_a_guidelines_3":"请勿使用任何不敬或亵渎性的词汇（及其变形或网络用语形式），不分语种。严禁发布任何带有憎恨性、歧视性、威胁、色情、暴力和煽动违法行为的点评及媒体。","m_rc_q_and_a_guidelines_4":"尊重他人隐私。{b_companyname}会隐藏任何电子邮箱地址、电话号码、网站地址、社交媒体帐号等类似个人信息。","m_rc_q_and_a_guidelines_5":"{b_companyname}对任何提问及回复不承担任何责任。{b_companyname}仅为这些问答提供发布平台，不是内容发布方也不负责验证。{b_companyname}可自行决定更改、修改、删除或以其他方式调整这些规范准则。","m_rc_q_and_a_helpful":"有用","m_rc_q_and_a_not_helpful":"没用","m_rc_q_and_a_voted_helpful":"{start_bold}你{end_bold}觉得这条答案有用","m_rc_q_and_a_voted_not_helpful":"{start_bold}你{end_bold}觉得这条答案没用","m_rc_qa_ask_eg_of_question":"如：住宿是否提供客房服务？","m_rc_qa_ask_find_title":"没找到想要的信息？提交住宿相关问题","m_rc_qa_limit_error_message":"请填写完整的问题（内容长度需在{num_min} - {num_max}字），且勿分享任何个人信息。","m_rc_rd_faq_guest_q_submit_cta":"提交问题","m_rc_rd_faq_guest_q_type":"输入你的问题：","m_rc_rd_faq_guest_thanks_answer":"谢谢提问！住宿回复后，我们将立即发送电子邮件向您转达。","pp_book_room_options":"预订","pp_page_back":"返回","propex_a11y_loading_content":"加载中","propex_qna_ask_question_body_1":"我们将你的问题转发给住宿之前，你需要登录或创建一个免费帐号。","propex_qna_ask_question_body_2":"一旦收到住宿的回复，我们将立即通过邮件发送给你。","propex_qna_ask_question_sign_in_register_cta":"登录或注册","propx_pp_qna_about_reply_days":"住宿通常在几天内回复","propx_pp_qna_about_reply_hours":"住宿通常在几小时内回复","propx_pp_qna_about_reply_mins":"住宿通常在几分钟内回复","propx_pp_qna_cta":"提问","propx_pp_qna_datestamp":"于{date}回答","propx_pp_qna_header_prop_qna":"住宿问答","propx_pp_qna_model_char_limit":"还可输入{num_char}个字","propx_prop_page_qna_translated":"已翻译","px_pp_qna_display_see_more":"查看更多问题（{num_questions}）","px_pp_qna_subheader_no_submission":"如你想了解有关住宿的更多信息，请浏览其他客人的提问","rc_q_and_a_email_collection_email_label":"电子邮箱","rc_q_and_a_email_malformed":"该电子邮箱无效，请重试。","rc_q_and_a_guidelines_1":"{b_companyname}的问答规范准则","rc_q_and_a_guidelines_2":"所有问答内容都必须与住宿或客房相关，并且内容越是详细，越能帮助其他客人更好地挑选喜爱的住宿。请勿附上个人信息、带有政治色彩、与伦理道德相关或宗教性的内容。促销活动信息将会被删除，不予显示。任何涉及{b_companyname}服务的相关问题都将转交客服团队及住宿服务团队处理。","rc_q_and_a_guidelines_3":"请勿使用任何不敬或亵渎性的词汇（及其变形或网络用语形式），不分语种。严禁发布任何带有憎恨性、歧视性、威胁、色情、暴力和煽动违法行为的点评及媒体。","rc_q_and_a_guidelines_4":"尊重他人隐私。{b_companyname}会隐藏任何电子邮箱地址、电话号码、网站地址、社交媒体帐号等类似个人信息。","rc_q_and_a_guidelines_5":"{b_companyname}对任何提问及回复不承担任何责任。{b_companyname}仅为这些问答提供发布平台，不是内容发布方也不负责验证。{b_companyname}可自行决定更改、修改、删除或以其他方式调整这些规范准则。","rc_qa_ask_eg_of_question":"如：住宿是否提供客房服务？","rc_qa_limit_error_message":"请填写完整的问题（内容长度需在{num_min} You can book it at the check-in for 11,50 € per person and day.","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"2020年3月27日","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":36129012,"question":"Do we have to pay for the luggage storage? Thank you!","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"2023年4月22日","answer":"You can store your bags in our luggage room free of charge!","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"2023年4月22日","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":26953912,"question":"Hi,\n\nIs there a safe parking posible for motorcycle near hotel? Tnx!","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"2022年7月2日","answer":"You can park your motorcycle at the parking garage \"Wipark\" in Felberstraße 1 (located next to our hotel). Parking costs 16 € per day, you can pay for the parking ticket at the reception.\n\nYes, all of our rooms have air condition!","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"2022年7月2日","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":7485940,"question":"Do you have vegan options and plenty of fruits for breakfast despite the Covid situation?","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"2021年2月26日","answer":"Our breakfast contains organic and fair trade products. Our vegan options are limited to two vegan spreads – Papayango (papaya and mango) and Mediterranean vegetable-tomato and plant milk. We also offer fruits. ","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"2021年2月27日","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":2051813,"question":"Do you have a fridge in room and WiFi in room?","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"2020年1月6日","answer":"Dear Guest!\nThere is no fridge in our rooms but we offer free WiFi everywhere in our hotel.\nBest regards,\nJulia Deutsch\nFront Office Agent","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"2020年1月6日","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":41566790,"question":"good morning,  I have recommend from my friends for your hotel, could yu tell me, the parking near you, is it garage? is it comfortable parking places becouse I drive SUV? please let me know asap \nkindly,\nsrdjan","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"2023年12月18日","answer":"Good morning!\nWe have a cooperation with a parking garage called Wi Park with special conditions of € 17,00 per 24 hours. This is very cheap for Viennese standards.\nThe adress is Felberstraße 1, 1150 Wien.\nKind regards,\nPetra Mic\nFront Office Agent","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"2023年12月18日","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":18967676,"question":"hi i want to ask about the airport bus i see in booking is writing that have stop in the right of hotel . which bus is from aiport at the hotel","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"2021年12月10日","answer":"From Vienna International Airport, you can take the bus “Vienna Airport Lines” which drives directly to Westbahnhof in about 40 minutes. It currently drives in 60 minute intervals.","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"2021年12月12日","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":35964520,"question":"my flight is arriving very late around 2 am. can i still ckeck in?","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"2023年4月15日","answer":"Yes, our reception is open 24/7.","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"2023年4月22日","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":40815800,"question":"Whats the difference between queen and double room? The price is same. Thanks ❤️for couples which is better ?","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"2023年11月8日","answer":"The rooms are all the same only the beds differ in size.\nQueen = 160cm x 200cm\nDouble (Kingsize-Bed) = 180cm x 200cm","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"2023年12月15日","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":17137757,"question":"Do you have shuttle bus from airport to hotel or what is best way to travel","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"2021年10月16日","answer":"Please note, that we don't offer shuttle services at Motel One.\nThere is an Airport Bus from Vienna Airport Lines, which runs every half hour between Westbahnhof and the Airport.\nKind regards \nMichael Guggenbichler\nFront Office Supervisor ","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"2021年11月12日","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":6532468,"question":"can a 2 year old stay in a Double queen room?","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"2021年1月17日","answer":"Yes, there is the possibility to provide a cot in our single and of course in our double rooms.","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"2021年1月17日","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":36024844,"question":"is there a height restriction on the parking","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"2023年4月18日","answer":"The entrance of our cooperation garage \"Wipark\" in Felberstraße 1 is 2.10 meters high.","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"2023年4月22日","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":1925154,"question":"do you have rooms with twin beds? I plan to book 1 dbl room from tomorrow for 3 nights","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"2019年12月22日","answer":"We don't have any rooms with twin beds at our hotel. We have rooms with queen-size bed (1.60 m wide, one mattress) and with king-size bed (1.80 m wide, two mattresses).","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"2020年3月12日","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":12955771,"question":"Gibt es Parkmöglichkeiten für zwei Nächte und wie sind die Parkpreise bitte","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"2021年7月15日","answer":"Unsere Kooperationsgarage (Felberstraße 1, 1150 Wien) bietet für Motel-One-Gäste eine Tageskarte für 15,- Euro pro Tag und Auto.","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"2021年7月18日","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":19127680,"question":"Hello, is it possible to have a portable bed put in the room, in case we are 3 guests? The only other option i saw to get an extra room :/","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"2021年12月15日","answer":"The maximum of adults in one room is 2. We have rooms with an additional bed or crib for 1 child up to 15 years.","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"2021年12月20日","roomId":33332301,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":1566119,"question":"Is there heating in the room?","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"2019年11月6日","answer":"yes","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"2019年11月7日","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":223152,"question":"Does the room have a safe?","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"2019年7月24日","answer":"Yes, all of our rooms have a small safe next to the bed.","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"2020年3月12日","roomId":33332301,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":43658683,"question":"Hi. Can I pay for luggage storage for 10days between my booking in May. \nIt’s one medium backpack.","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"2024年3月26日","answer":"You can store the luggage at the reception free of charge!","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"2024年3月30日","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":24379906,"question":"hallo,\nich komme morgen sehr spät in Wien an - 23:40uhr.\ngibt es irgendein Problem mit check-in bzw. habt ihr freie Zimmer?\ndanke und lg\nThomas","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"2022年5月10日","answer":"Ein Check In nach 18:00 Uhr ist bei einer garantierten Buchung ohne Probleme möglich.\nAuch unser Front Office ist 24 Stunden am Tag für Sie besetzt.","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"2022年5月22日","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":2117756,"question":"We are looking for a room for 3 people. 3, 15. 鲁多尔福斯海姆 - 芬豪斯, 1150 维也纳, 奥地利","formattedAddressShort":"Europaplatz 3, 15. 鲁多尔福斯海姆 - 芬豪斯, 维也纳","isOldTown":false,"oecdType":"URBAN"},"name":"Motel One Wien-Westbahnhof","pageName":"motel-one-wien-westbahnhof","externalReviews":null,"reviews":{"__typename":"Reviews","showScore":null},"accommodationTypeId":204},"BookingHomeFlags:{}":{"__typename":"BookingHomeFlags","isBH8":false,"isSUP":false},"StarRating:{}":{"__typename":"StarRating","value":3,"symbol":"STARS","tocLink":{"__typename":"TranslationTag","translation":"前往“我们如何运作”页面了解更多"},"showAdditionalInfoIcon":false,"caption":{"__typename":"TranslationTag","translation":"该星级由住宿提供给Booking.com，通常由官方的酒店评级组织或其他第三方评定。"}},"PropertySustainability:{}":{"__typename":"PropertySustainability","isSustainable":false,"certifications":null},"TripTypesHotelPage:{}":{"__typename":"TripTypesHotelPage","nearbySkiLifts":null,"beaches":null,"closestTopBeach":null},"PropertyTripTypeLabelsInfo:{}":{"__typename":"PropertyTripTypeLabelsInfo","isSkiSeason":false,"enabledDestinationLabels":[],"enabledPropertyLabels":[]},"HotelTranslation:{}":{"__typename":"HotelTranslation","name":"Motel One Wien-Westbahnhof","description":"Motel One汽车旅馆是一家现代化酒店，位于维也纳的西火车站（Westbahnhof）交通枢纽和购物中心内，距离市中心有10分钟的地铁车程，设有免费无线网络连接，提供空调隔音客房。\n\n时尚的客房设有平面卫星电视、可移动工作区以及带典雅家具和花洒淋浴的设计新颖的浴室。\n\nMotel One Wien-Westbahnhof汽车旅馆设有24小时前台以及装饰有雅各布森（Arne Jacobsen）设计的座椅和施华洛世奇（Swarovski）水晶吊灯的酒吧。\n\nMariahilfer Straße购物大街距离旅馆仅有几步之遥，地铁U3和U6号线在旅馆内也有停靠站，机场巴士站就位于旅馆外面。","markupDescription":null,"finePrint":null,"metadata":{"__typename":"Metadata","formMetadata":[{"__typename":"FormMetadata","form":"summary","actualLanguage":"en-gb","trackedExperiment":null,"generatorSignature":null}]}},"ContentTranslation:HOTEL/DESCRIPTION_EXP_AUTOGEN_HW_GOOGLE_MT_MANY_LANGS@333323":{"__typename":"ContentTranslation","id":"HOTEL/DESCRIPTION_EXP_AUTOGEN_HW_GOOGLE_MT_MANY_LANGS@333323","name":"Motel One 是一家现代化的酒店，位于维也纳西火车站交通枢纽和购物中心内，距离市中心仅需 10 分钟地铁车程。 酒店提供免费WiFi和带空调、隔音设施的客房。\n\n时尚的客房配备平板卫星电视、移动工作站以及设计精美的浴室，浴室配有优雅的家具和雨淋式花洒。\n\n维也纳西火车站一号汽车旅馆设有 24 小时前台，酒吧内装饰有 Arne Jacobsen 设计的椅子和施华洛世奇水晶吊灯。\n\n玛丽亚希尔弗大街购物街就在几步之遥，地铁 U3 和 U6 线也在此设有站点。 机场巴士站就在门口。"},"TopicFilter:4":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":4,"name":"位置","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:1":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":1,"name":"早餐","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:28":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":28,"name":"火车","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:14":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":14,"name":"浴室","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:8":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":8,"name":"地铁","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:21":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":21,"name":"火车站","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:10":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":10,"name":"交通","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:32":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":32,"name":"公交","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:30":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":30,"name":"洗澡","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:37":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":37,"name":"大巴","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:9":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":9,"name":"行李","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:3":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":3,"name":"机场","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:2":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":2,"name":"停车","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:23":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":23,"name":"安静","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:13":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":13,"name":"电梯","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:22":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":22,"name":"热水","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:11":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":11,"name":"班车","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:5":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":5,"name":"Wifi","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:35":{"__typename":"TopicFilter","id":35,"name":"沙发","isSelected":false,"translation":null},"TopicFilter:6":{"__ty
